text: 伝承を刻む救世の英雄

皆の助力で黒き繭へと辿り着いた守護輝士。
【仮面】を名乗るエルミルは、世界を
滅ぼさんとその最奥にて待ち受ける。
――――――――――――――――――――
※ダークブラスト使用不可
失敗条件/戦闘不能後、リタイアを選択

皆の助力で黒き繭へと辿り着いた守護輝士。
【仮面】を名乗るエルミルは、世界を
滅ぼさんとその最奥にて待ち受ける。
※ダークブラスト使用不可

With the help of their many supporters,
the Guardians at last reached the Black Cocoon.
Elmir, under the self-proclaimed moniker of
Persona the Masked, lay in wait for them in the
furthest depths, seething with hatred for a world
he wished to destroy utterly.
----------------------------------------
The use of Dark Blast is prohibited.
You will fail this quest if you become incapacitated
or retire.

With the help of their supporters, the Guardians reached the
Black Cocoon. Elmir, the self-proclaimed moniker of Persona
the Masked, waits for them in the furthest depths...
The use of Dark Blast is prohibited.
